task.title: Install AEM Guides On-Premise
task.shortdesc: Install AEM Guides on your on-premise system.

context.p: Install AEM Guides on your on-premise system to use its features for creating and delivering DITA-based content.

step.cmd: Download the AEM Guides installation package from the Adobe Software Distribution Portal.
Ensure your system meets the technical requirements for installing AEM Guides.
Follow the installation instructions to install AEM Guides on your on-premise system.

result.p: AEM Guides is successfully installed on your on-premise system.
